message: The final image - You went to far. All the images should have the same design and I like the design that you did for the first 5. When i said it should be the full size i meant the poster should be the full size of the window that you created int he middle of your image like you did with the other posters.
resolution: Regenerated slide 6 with poster properly scaled to fill the card area. All 6 slides now use consistent design with full-size poster images.
